title: Quickstart AI Study Kit
topic: Learning with retrieval and adaptive quizzes
key_points: Ground answers in cited source chunks.
Keep lesson units short and focused.
Use mistakes to adapt next-question difficulty.
practice_prompts: Explain why citations improve trust in AI answers.
Design a 5-minute lesson from one source paragraph.
Propose one quiz adaptation rule based on learner confidence.
Describe one failure mode of retrieval QA and how to mitigate it.
